# California Consumer Privacy Act as amended by CPRA

Jurisdiction: United States - California
Region: US-CA
Citation: California Consumer Privacy Act of 2018
Authority: California Privacy Protection Agency
Source URL: https://cppa.ca.gov/regulations/pdf/ccpa_statute.pdf
Topics: notice_transparency, consent, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, third_party_sharing, retention_deletion, security_breach, children_data, marketing_opt_out, data_minimization, accountability
Keywords: CCPA, CPRA, California, personal information, sell, share, sensitive personal information, opt-out, Do Not Sell or Share, 加州, 出售或共享, 敏感个人信息

## Summary
California comprehensive privacy law covering notice, consumer rights, sale/share opt-out, sensitive personal information limitation, retention disclosure, service provider and contractor terms, and enforcement by CPPA.

## Key compliance obligations
- Provide notice at collection and privacy policy disclosures.
- Support access, deletion, correction, portability, sale/share opt-out, and sensitive personal information limitation rights.
- Include required terms with service providers, contractors, and third parties.
- Disclose retention periods or criteria and avoid incompatible secondary uses.
